mapper.sql: id, canonical_symbol, trade_date, bar_start_time, bar_end_time, interval_type, session_type, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, turnover_rate, adjust_type, data_source, fetched_at, raw_hash, quality_status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_minute_bar (canonical_symbol, trade_date, bar_start_time, bar_end_time, interval_type, session_type, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, turnover_rate, adjust_type, data_source, fetched_at, raw_hash, quality_status) VALUES (#{canonicalSymbol}, #{tradeDate}, #{barStartTime}, #{barEndTime}, #{intervalType}, #{sessionType}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{turnoverRate}, #{adjustType}, #{dataSource}, #{fetchedAt}, #{rawHash}, #{qualityStatus})

INSERT INTO stock_minute_bar (canonical_symbol, trade_date, bar_start_time, bar_end_time, interval_type, session_type, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, turnover_rate, adjust_type, data_source, fetched_at, raw_hash, quality_status) VALUES
(#{item.canonicalSymbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.barStartTime}, #{item.barEndTime}, #{item.intervalType}, #{item.sessionType}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount}, #{item.turnoverRate}, #{item.adjustType}, #{item.dataSource}, #{item.fetchedAt}, #{item.rawHash}, #{item.qualityStatus})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM stock_minute_bar
ORDER BY bar_start_time ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_minute_bar WHERE canonical_symbol = #{canonicalSymbol}
